summary: Tested UI bug fixes for Messages page dropdown and Reconciliation page. Messages page Select User dropdown CONFIRMED WORKING - opens correctly with 10 users, selection works. Reconciliation page calendar loads correctly in initial tests but experiences intermittent loading issues in Playwright automation due to Emergent preview environment DataCloneError issues. Backend APIs ALL WORKING verified via curl. Code fixes verified: getAuthHeaders added to AuthContext.js and exported, Reconciliation.js uses correct /api/psp endpoint.

integration_issues.issue: Page intermittently shows loading spinner in Playwright automation - caused by Emergent preview environment DataCloneError in emergent-main.js, NOT application code issue
integration_issues.priority: LOW - Environment issue, not code issue

passed_tests: Messages page: 'New Message' button click opens dialog
Messages page: Select User dropdown opens successfully (data-testid='recipient-select')
Messages page: Dropdown shows 10 users from /api/users
Messages page: User selection works correctly
Backend: /api/psp returns PSP accounts (endpoint is singular, not /api/psps)
Code: getAuthHeaders function exists and exported from AuthContext.js
Code: Messages.js imports and uses getAuthHeaders correctly
critical_code_review_comments: getAuthHeaders correctly implemented as useCallback in AuthContext.js (lines 204-208)
Both bug fixes verified in code

success_rate.frontend: Messages: 100% | Reconciliation: Partial (calendar loads but Playwright automation intermittent due to env issues)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Messages page Select User dropdown works - getAuthHeaders was added to AuthContext.js. 2) Reconciliation page uses correct /api/psp endpoint (not /api/psps). Backend APIs all confirmed working. Reconciliation page calendar displayed correctly in first test run (March 2026 with transactions on days 3,4,5) but Playwright had intermittent issues with page loading due to Emergent preview environment DataCloneError - this is NOT a code issue.

messages_dropdown.evidence: Playwright test confirmed dropdown opens with 10 users, user selection works
messages_dropdown.fix_applied: getAuthHeaders function added to AuthContext.js and exported

reconciliation_type_dropdown.status: CODE FIX VERIFIED, MANUAL TEST RECOMMENDED
reconciliation_type_dropdown.evidence: Code review confirmed /api/psp endpoint used (not /api/psps), curl tests show API works
reconciliation_type_dropdown.note: Playwright had intermittent loading issues with calendar due to Emergent env, recommend manual verification
